What I Do

Services & Expertise

End-to-end advisory from technology architecture to organizational design.

Technology Strategy

Architecture design, platform modernization, and CTO-level advisory to align technology with business objectives.

Team Building

Recruiting, structuring, and scaling high-performance engineering and data organizations globally.

Organizational Development

Designing Centers of Excellence, operating models, and execution frameworks that scale with your business.

Data & AI Platforms

Building enterprise-grade data platforms and AI/ML capabilities that deliver measurable business value.

Digital Transformation

Leading large-scale transformation programs that modernize technology stacks and operating models.

Interim CTO / Advisor

Embedded executive leadership to bridge gaps, accelerate roadmaps, and coach engineering leadership.
